raw_consumer_statement: I have a double cash Citi credit card. I want to file a dispute for a product I purchased on XXXX that has safety concerns. XXXX has instructed me to follow this procedure. I sent a letter to Citi billing dispute which they have not responded to. The product conern is XXXX  : XXXX. I want a refund and the XXXX seller has not responded to my request for a refund.
